description: The underbelly of HR: a deeply questionable market where sketchy healers, illegal arms sellers, fences, and assassin contacts all work under one roof.

items.name: Dodgy Healing Potion
items.description: Heals 1d4+4. Roll 1d6 for a side effect.

items.name: Forget-Root Powder
items.description: A fine chalky dust; if inhaled or consumed, the target forgets the last 12 seconds.

items.name: Glass Eye of Watching
items.description: A glass eye; when used, the user sees through the eye but cannot see through their own eyes.

items.name: Pouch of Generosity
items.description: A common wondrous item that produces candies, copper pieces, or small toys, but only when used with the intent to give them away.

items.name: Iron Arrow of Return
items.description: Fired by miming the act of loading or drawing. Uses the relevant bow stats and returns to the shooter after impact.

items.name: Unclear Missile
items.description: Fits any ranged or siege weapon. On impact, it emits a 60-foot aura of confusion for 1 minute, causing disadvantage on Perception checks, then evaporates.

items.name: Rod of Disintegration
items.description: A one-use rod that disintegrates a target on activation, then crumbles to dust.

items.name: Bottled Ooze
items.description: A small ooze sealed in glass. It corrodes objects and can attack creatures. Favored by assassins and alchemists.

items.name: Magnetic Orb
items.description: A large iron orb activated by command word. It creates a powerful magnetic pull that slows armored foes and disarms weapons. It must be recharged with lightning.

items.name: Pristine Lockpick Set
items.description: Functions as Thieves' Tools and grants an additional +2 bonus.

items.name: The Helpful Hand
items.description: A rotting hand kept in a silk-lined box. It understands Common, excels at one skill, obeys when promised return to its box, and may leave if it finds a more comfortable home.

items.name: Goblin Mask
items.description: A clay mask that makes a small humanoid appear to be a human child. Commonly used for infiltration.

items.name: Ice Weapon
items.description: An enchanted +2 ice arrow, dagger, or shortsword that does not melt or shatter until 1 minute after touching blood.

items.name: Illusion Scroll of the Living Double
items.description: Creates a hyper-realistic illusion that believes it is real. If confronted with proof, it suffers an existential crisis, goes insane, and rapidly shifts forms until ended by Dispel Magic.

items.name: Shield of Shame
items.description: Grants +2 AC while clothed. For each major piece of clothing removed (starting with armor), the bonus increases by +1, up to +8.

items.name: Staff of Light
items.description: A simple staff with the title staff of light.

items.name: wand of acid spray
items.description: A wand with the title staff of acid spray.

items.name: Truly Immovable Rod
items.description: A Immovable rod, when you push a small button on the side, stands still on a fixed place in space.
